title: Create: TaCZ Automation
description: Allows many items from Tac zero to be crafted automatically with create
body:
Allows ammo from TaZC(Timeless and Classics Zero) to be crafted automatically with Create It also goes well with my other mod: [Create Renewability](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-renewability)



Usage
If you would like to use this in a modpack go ahead
You are not permitted to upload this anywhere other than in a Curseforge/Modrinth modpack
Please give any suggestions or questions in the comments

If you want me to add support for an addon just ask I'll probably add it

Enjoy!

[Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-tacz-automation)
